Document:
# Mining
Mining is one of the main methods of resource extraction in CrystallEdge. Currently, you can mine the following important resources:
There are two main mining methods:
## Manual Mining
On the island, you can find a large amount of ore and crystals, which yield resources when excavated. This is a quick way to obtain resources, but it is limited, as new ore does not appear.
## Automated Mining
While exploring the map, you may find special deposits called "Ore Cores," which provide [color=yellow]an infinite amount of resources[/color].
To find them (and they appear in different places each round), use mining goggles:
You can mine them manually, but it is slow and tedious, so you can use automated drills and conveyors for efficient mining and transportation of resources.
